SCRAPYARD_RELIC_SCRAPYARD_RELIC.title: Defective Core
SCRAPYARD_RELIC_SCRAPYARD_RELIC.descript: At the start of combat, gain [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Electric Potential[/gold].
SCRAPYARD_RELIC_SCRAPYARD_PERFECT_CORE_R: At the start of combat, gain [blue]12[/blue] [gold]Electric Potential[/gold].
Its defect was preserved perfectly, and is therefore more stable.
